summary: Revised SIMMUTU per your notes: added indicator-level benchmarking flag (migration, model, request, controller, create/edit forms, index table), changed mapping label to Unit Terkait with one-click Pilih semua in indicator create/edit, changed realisation index numeric presentation to plain values (no accounting-like formatting), and added realisation filters by indikator, unit, and period anchor in backend+frontend.
current_status: Input realisasi is working with date-based entry; profile indikator now carries benchmarking; unit mapping UX is faster; realisation list has filters and cleaner number display. Remaining optional refinement is adding more filter types (date range) if needed.
